node_types.description: An individual receiving clinical assessment or treatment for insomnia.

properties.description: Previous treatments for insomnia or related conditions

node_types.description: A standardized instrument or method used to assess insomnia symptoms, severity, or related factors.

node_types.description: A record of a patient's sleep patterns, habits, and quality over time.

properties.description: Total time awake after initially falling asleep

node_types.description: A specific therapeutic technique or intervention used within CBT for insomnia.
